title: thesium linophyllon var. montanum
intro: Thesium linophyllon var. montanum, also known as the Alpine Thyme or Mountain Thyme, is a variety of the Thesium linophyllon plant, a flowering perennial native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Thesium linophyllon var. montanum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve digestion, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and anti-aging agent. Thesium linophyllon var. montanum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
